expectations.text: Manifest JSON has type set to 'dashboard'
Manifest JSON includes alias, name, and element fields
Manifest JSON has meta.label and meta.pathname
Manifest JSON has a condition with alias 'Umb.Condition.SectionAlias' and match 'Umb.Section.Content'
Manifest is wrapped in an extensions array inside umbraco-package.json
expectations.evidence: Top-level extensions array wraps the dashboard extension
import { css, html, customElement, LitElement } from '@umbraco-cms/backoffice/external/lit'

expectations.text: Element uses @customElement() decorator for registration (not customElements.define)
Element has a render() method returning html template with welcome content
expectations.evidence: render() returns html with 'Welcome' headline and paragraph
